records.notes: Pure RTL implementation role should use the Digital IC master unchanged.
ASIC front-end design is a clear Digital IC label.
CPU RTL ownership should not drift to verification.
GPU datapath design is Digital IC.
RTL base with ML accelerator evidence can justify SparrowML crossover.
FPGA-heavy RTL role remains Digital IC.
Coherence/interconnect maps to existing Digital IC base projects.
C/Python are support tools; RTL ownership dominates.
Interconnect design should not be classified as software.
CPU verification can emphasize Sparrow-V verification block.
GPU context should not switch to Digital IC design.
Verification infrastructure is hybrid but should keep verification base.
Aligns with AXI router verification block.
Security context maps to verification block.
Sparrow-V verification is the strongest compatible block.
Hybrid verification/software but UVM context should be visible.
Systems software can mention low-level concepts without being RTL.
Speech/NLP aligns with dementia speech project.
Edge inference can emphasize SparrowML within ML.
ML systems can be hybrid but model context dominates.
Evaluation is ML when model metrics are central.
NPU compiler can reasonably land ML or software; automatic tailoring should stay bounded.
Hybrid but no approved cross-family software insertion for verification.
Ambiguous GPU performance role should be reviewable.
Embedded AI integration is software/ML hybrid.
AI-product platform should not automatically swap to ML project.
Applications role is intentionally ambiguous and reviewable.
Ambiguous tooling crossing ML and verification should require review.
Hardware/software co-design with Digital IC base.
Held-out GPU performance for ML inference.
Held-out ambiguous applications role should be reviewable.
Analog IC is outside supported digital families.
Sales role is out of scope.
Finance role is out of supported scope.
Held-out business role with semiconductor context.
